## 🔌 API

- [**mcp-for-beginners**](https://github.com/microsoft/mcp-for-beginners) 🏠 (⭐ 10.3k, 🍴 3k, 🐛 2) - This open-source curriculum introduces the fundamentals of Model Context Protocol (MCP) through real-world, cross-language examples in .NET, Java, TypeScript, JavaScript, Rust and Python. Designed for developers, it focuses on practical techniques for building modular, scalable, and secure AI workflows from session setup to service orchestration. `jupyter notebook` `csharp` `java` `javascript` `javascript-applications` `git clone https://github.com/microsoft/mcp-for-beginners`

Standalone for your file access or embed in any MCP server (Rust, Node.js, Python via WASM). `file` `http` `ai` `git` `github`

## 🤝 Contributing

This list is automatically generated and updated. To add your MCP server:

### 📝 Submit via JSON (Recommended)
1. Fork this repository
2. Copy `contributions/template.json` to `contributions/your-server-name.json`
3. Fill in your MCP server details
4. Submit a Pull Request

### 📋 Submit via Issue
Create an issue with your MCP server information using our template.

**Requirements**: Must be a legitimate MCP server with public source code and documentation.

📚 **[Full Contributing Guide →](contributions/README.md)**
